„Äêüé≤ Dice System„Äë
‚ï≠‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ üéØ Secret rolls ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ
‚îÇ ‚Ä¢ dr [command] - result via DM
‚îÇ ‚Ä¢ ddr/dddr - DM to configured GMs
‚îÇ ‚Ä¢ .drgm - GM settings
‚îÇ
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ üìä Basic rolls ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ
‚îÇ Format: [count]d[sides][operator][modifier]
‚îÇ
‚îÇ Examples:
‚îÇ „ÄÄ‚Ä¢ 2d6+1 - roll two d6 +1
‚îÇ „ÄÄ‚Ä¢ (2d6+1)*2 attack!
‚îÇ „ÄÄ  sample: (10[5+5]+1)2 = 22
‚îÇ

‚îÇ „ÄÄ‚Ä¢ .5 3D6 - roll 3d6 five times
‚îÇ „ÄÄ‚Ä¢ math + parentheses
‚îÇ „ÄÄ‚Ä¢ comparisons >, <, >=, <=
‚îÇ
‚îÇ Keep/drop:
‚îÇ „ÄÄ‚Ä¢ kh - keep highest
‚îÇ „ÄÄ‚Ä¢ kl - keep lowest
‚îÇ „ÄÄ‚Ä¢ dh - drop highest
‚îÇ „ÄÄ‚Ä¢ dl - drop lowest
‚îÇ
‚îÇ Examples:
‚îÇ „ÄÄ‚Ä¢ 3d6kh1 - keep highest die
‚îÇ „ÄÄ‚Ä¢ 3d6dl2 - drop lowest two
‚îÇ

init.help:
„Äê‚öîÔ∏è Initiative Tracker„Äë
In TRPG combat, turn order is usually decided by initiative.
Systems like D&D and Infinite Horror need a fresh 1D20+mod each fight,
so this feature stores your roll formula and supports one-click reroll.

‚ï≠‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ üìã Register characters ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ
‚îÇ Usage: .in (roll or number) (name)
‚îÇ
‚îÇ (roll or number) required ‚Äî e.g. 1D20+3 or just 5
‚îÇ (name) optional ‚Äî if omitted, uses your chat display name
‚îÇ Enter different names multiple times to add more characters
‚îÇ
‚îÇ Examples:
‚îÇ „ÄÄ‚Ä¢ .in 1d20+3 Alice
‚îÇ „ÄÄ‚Ä¢ .in 1d3
‚îÇ „ÄÄ‚Ä¢ .in 80
‚îÇ „ÄÄ‚Ä¢ .in -3+6*3/2.1  (supports arithmetic)
‚îÇ
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ üìä Show table ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ
‚îÇ ‚Ä¢ .init  ‚Äî high to low
‚îÇ ‚Ä¢ .initn ‚Äî low to high
‚îÇ
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ üé≤ Reroll initiative ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ
‚îÇ ‚Ä¢ .in reroll
‚îÇ   Reroll using each character's saved formula
‚îÇ   (ideal for systems that reroll every combat)
‚îÇ
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ ‚öôÔ∏è Other ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ
‚îÇ ‚Ä¢ .in remove (name) ‚Äî remove that character
‚îÇ ‚Ä¢ .in clear ‚Äî clear the whole table
‚îÇ
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ ‚≠ï Combat rounds ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ
‚îÇ ‚Ä¢ .init start ‚Äî start round
‚îÇ ‚Ä¢ .init next ‚Äî next turn
‚îÇ ‚Ä¢ .init [name] ‚Äî jump to character
‚îÇ ‚Ä¢ .init end ‚Äî end round
‚îÇ ‚Ä¢ .init stats [name] [status]
‚îÇ   (attach status text)
‚ï∞‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ

ddr.help:
„Äêüé≤ Dark Roll GM„Äë
‚ï≠‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ üìù Overview ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ
‚îÇ ‚Ä¢ GM-only private roll delivery
‚îÇ ‚Ä¢ Multiple GMs can receive dark rolls
‚îÇ ‚Ä¢ Custom GM display names supported
‚îÇ
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ üëë GM commands ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ
‚îÇ ‚ñÝ Basics:
‚îÇ ‚Ä¢ .drgm addgm
‚îÇ   Register as GM
‚îÇ
‚îÇ ‚Ä¢ .drgm addgm [alias]
‚îÇ   Register with a display alias
‚îÇ   (omit alias to show your real name)
‚îÇ
‚îÇ ‚Ä¢ .drgm show
‚îÇ   List current GMs
‚îÇ
‚îÇ ‚Ä¢ .drgm del [index]
‚îÇ   Remove a GM by index
‚îÇ
‚îÇ ‚Ä¢ .drgm del all
‚îÇ   Clear all GMs
‚îÇ
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ üé≤ Dark roll modes ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ
‚îÇ ‚ñÝ Three modes:
‚îÇ
‚îÇ ‚Ä¢ dr [command]
‚îÇ   Result to yourself only
‚îÇ   e.g. dr cc 80 Brawl
‚îÇ
‚îÇ ‚Ä¢ ddr [command]
‚îÇ   Result to GM and yourself
‚îÇ   e.g. ddr cc 80 Brawl
‚îÇ
‚îÇ ‚Ä¢ dddr [command]
‚îÇ   Result to GM only
‚îÇ   e.g. dddr cc 80 Brawl
‚îÇ
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ üí° Examples ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ
‚îÇ 1Ô∏è‚É£ Set GM:
‚îÇ ‚Ä¢ .drgm addgm
‚îÇ   Register with your name
‚îÇ
‚îÇ ‚Ä¢ .drgm addgm HostA
‚îÇ   Register as "HostA"
‚îÇ
‚îÇ 2Ô∏è‚É£ Roll:
‚îÇ ‚Ä¢ dr 2d6
‚îÇ   Roll 2d6; only you see the result
‚îÇ
‚îÇ ‚Ä¢ ddr cc 50 Stealth
‚îÇ   Stealth check; you and GM see it
‚îÇ
‚îÇ ‚Ä¢ dddr .sc 1/1d3

coc.cult_power_0:
Mythos Creatures
Some form of association with Mythos beings such as Deep Ones, Rat-Things, Shoggoths, Star Vampires, and the like.
In exchange for service or sacrifice, the monster protects and aids the cult leader.
coc.cult_power_1:
Artifacts
Items that grant spell-like abilities, protection, means of attack, or similar effects (such as reservoirs for Magic Points or even POW).
The artifact may originate from beyond Earth or from antiquity.
coc.cult_power_2:
Technology
Perhaps from Xoth (Cthulhu's home before coming to Earth), or from another dimension or another world, such a device may provide spell-like effects, store Magic Points, serve as a magical weapon, or offer protection like armor.
coc.cult_power_3:
Granted Power
A form of "blessing" implanted in the cult leader's mind by Cthulhu or its servitors. This power may replicate the same spell effects‚Äîor diminished ones, usually at half cost‚Äîin Magic Points or POW.
The power may take other forms as well: physical or sensory changes‚Äîtentacles sprouting from the face or body, scaly skin like armor, heightened senses, and so on.
coc.cult_means_0:
Sacrifice
For some purpose, cultists sacrifice living humans and/or animals. This may prove loyalty, serve as a source of power, or form part of a greater plan.
coc.cult_means_1:
Ritual
One or more forms of ritual requiring a small group or a large congregation. The ritual may serve the cult entirely, or satisfy Cthulhu's will to accomplish something‚Äîgreat or small.
coc.cult_means_2:
Gathering
Perhaps collecting knowledge (occult tomes), specific resources, or even specific people. The cult must gather "something" for reasons known only to Cthulhu.
coc.cult_means_3:
Service
By serving a mysterious entity‚Äîone linked to Cthulhu‚Äîthe cult fulfills Cthulhu's will. In return, the cult receives aid of some kind from that being. Or the cult is already entangled with the entity and must obey its commands. Perhaps the entity has no real tie to Cthulhu and merely claims one to gain more power over the cult.
coc.cult_means_4:
Creation
The cult is commanded to build something. This may be a magical gate, a mysterious artifact, a site that can focus tremendous power, or a temple. Perhaps it is only the creation of a secret network to one day seize a town, a city, a nation, or the world.
coc.cult_means_5:
Destruction
The cult is commanded to destroy something‚Äîperhaps whatever obstructs, angers, or harms Cthulhu. This may mean razing an ancient temple, breaking a mystical barrier, or overthrowing a government or organization at odds with Cthulhu's aims.
coc.cult_means_6:
Transformation
Cultists must undergo transformation‚Äîof body or mind. Human limits cannot fulfill Cthulhu's goals, or mortals are too fragile for the world to come, so cultists seek to become something greater. This may be a new stage of human evolution, or assimilation with the Mythos, as with the Deep Ones.
coc.cult_means_7:
Hunt and Kill
Destroy Cthulhu's enemies‚Äîhuman factions or rival Mythos races such as the Elder Things whose actions oppose the Great Old One. Such beings may threaten Cthulhu's terrible design. Perhaps in hunting and slaying their quarry, the cult is rewarded: consuming the kill may grant Mythos power or insight, and so on.

character.help:
„Äêüé≠ HKTRPG Character Cards„Äë
‚ï≠‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ üìù Overview ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ
‚îÇ ‚Ä¢ Personal character management
‚îÇ ‚Ä¢ One card usable across groups
‚îÇ ‚Ä¢ Web and chat clients stay in sync
‚îÇ ‚Ä¢ Live rolls and stat tracking
‚îÇ
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ üî∞ Quick start ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ
‚îÇ 1Ô∏è‚É£ Create a card
‚îÇ    .char add
‚îÇ
‚îÇ 2Ô∏è‚É£ Create a web account
‚îÇ    .admin account [user] [password]
‚îÇ
‚îÇ 3Ô∏è‚É£ (Optional) Allow web rolls in the group
‚îÇ    .admin allowrolling
‚îÇ    .admin registerChannel
‚îÇ
‚îÇ 4Ô∏è‚É£ Use the character
‚îÇ    .char use [name]
‚îÇ    .ch [commands]
‚îÇ
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ üÜï Create / edit ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ
‚îÇ ‚ñÝ Full format:
.char add
name[Sad]~
state[HP:15/15;MP:10/10;San:80;STR:50;DEX:60;]~
roll[Brawl: cc 50;Shoot: cc 45;SanCheck: .sc {San};]~
notes[Note: test card ‚Äî try .char use Sad]~
image[https://example.com/avatar.png]~
‚îÇ
‚îÇ ‚ñÝ Edit:
.char edit name[Name]~
state[...]~ roll[...]~ notes[...]~ image[https://example.com/avatar.png]~
‚îÇ
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ üíª Management ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ
‚îÇ ‚ñÝ Web (recommended):
‚îÇ 1) Create account: .admin account [user] [password]
‚îÇ 2) Open https://card.hktrpg.com
‚îÇ 3) Edit visually and save
‚îÇ
‚îÇ ‚ñÝ Chat:
‚îÇ 1) Use .char edit
‚îÇ 2) Same format as create
‚îÇ
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ üìä Data commands ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ
‚îÇ ‚ñÝ Basics:
‚îÇ ‚Ä¢ .char show ‚Äî list cards
‚îÇ ‚Ä¢ .char show0 ‚Äî show card #0 details
‚îÇ ‚Ä¢ .char use [name] ‚Äî activate
‚îÇ ‚Ä¢ .char nonuse ‚Äî deactivate
‚îÇ ‚Ä¢ .char delete [name] ‚Äî delete
‚îÇ ‚Ä¢ .ch show ‚Äî show status
‚îÇ ‚Ä¢ .ch showall ‚Äî show full card
‚îÇ
‚îÇ ‚ñÝ Avatar (image):
‚îÇ ‚Ä¢ In .char add / .char edit: image[https://...]
‚îÇ ‚Ä¢ Only http/https; localhost/private IPs rejected
‚îÇ ‚Ä¢ Website shows full avatar left of the name
‚îÇ
‚îÇ ‚ñÝ Stat ops:
‚îÇ ‚Ä¢ .ch [stat] ‚Äî show value
‚îÇ ‚Ä¢ .ch [stat] [number] ‚Äî set value
‚îÇ ‚Ä¢ .ch [stat] +/- [number] ‚Äî add/subtract
‚îÇ ‚Ä¢ .ch [stat] */ [number] ‚Äî multiply/divide
‚îÇ ‚Ä¢ .ch [stat] +/- [xDy] ‚Äî adjust by roll
‚îÇ ‚Ä¢ .ch set [stat] new text ‚Äî replace text
‚îÇ
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ üé≤ Special features ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ
‚îÇ ‚ñÝ Discord buttons:
‚îÇ ‚Ä¢ .ch button ‚Äî status buttons
‚îÇ ‚Ä¢ .char button [name] ‚Äî roll buttons
‚îÇ
‚îÇ ‚ñÝ Button forwarding:
‚îÇ ‚Ä¢ .forward [Discord message link]
‚îÇ ‚Ä¢ .forward show / .forward delete [id]
‚îÇ
‚îÇ ‚ñÝ Expressions:
‚îÇ ‚Ä¢ {var}: reference a stat ‚Äî e.g. {HP} {san}
‚îÇ   Math: 1+{HP} ‚Üí 1+15
‚îÇ ‚Ä¢ <>: roll expressions
‚îÇ   <1D100>  <cc {Shoot}>  <.sc {san} 1/1d3>
‚îÇ
‚îÇ ‚ñÝ Examples:
‚îÇ ‚Ä¢ .ch hp +3 ‚Äî heal 3 HP
‚îÇ ‚Ä¢ .ch san -<1d6> ‚Äî lose 1d6 Sanity
‚îÇ ‚Ä¢ .ch str <3D6dl2> ‚Äî roll 3d6 drop low 2
‚îÇ
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ üåê Group settings ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ
‚îÇ ‚ñÝ Admin enable:
‚îÇ ‚Ä¢ .admin allowrolling
‚îÇ ‚Ä¢ .admin registerChannel
‚îÇ
‚îÇ ‚ñÝ Admin disable:
‚îÇ ‚Ä¢ .admin disallowrolling
‚îÇ ‚Ä¢ .admin unregisterChannel
‚îÇ
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ ‚öÝÔ∏è Notes ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ
‚îÇ ‚Ä¢ Do not use spaces in stat names
‚îÇ ‚Ä¢ Prefer .ch for daily updates
‚îÇ ‚Ä¢ Prefer web UI for large edits
‚îÇ ‚Ä¢ Pin buttons for reuse
‚îÇ ‚Ä¢ Activate the card per group when switching channels
‚ï∞‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ

‚ï≠‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ üé≤ Format ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ

‚îÇ „ÄÄ‚Ä¢ Range: 1‚Äì20

‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ üìã Resolution ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ
‚îÇ Success requires:

„Äêüé≤ Events„Äë.event (add delete show) .evt (random / event name)
Added events can grant status or change EXP, and earn bonus EXP.
‚ï≠‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ üìù Basic commands ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ
‚îÇ .event add              - add an event
‚îÇ .event delete <name>    - delete an event
‚îÇ .event show             - list your events & earned EXP
‚îÇ .event show <name>      - show details for one event
‚îÇ .event useExp           - spend earned EXP in the group
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ üéØ Play commands ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ
‚îÇ .evt random             - random event (costs 5 EN)
‚îÇ .evt <series name>      - enter a series (costs 10 EN)
‚îÇ .evt <event name>       - enter an event (costs 15 EN)
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ ‚ö° Energy ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ
‚îÇ EN cap = 20+LV
‚îÇ ‚è∞ +1 EN every 10 minutes
‚îÇ üí° Learn names via others or random events
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ üìù Add format ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ
‚îÇ .event add
‚îÇ name:Haha
‚îÇ chain:Happy Series
‚îÇ exp:SAN
‚îÇ 0:Good luck today;You are kind;I love you
‚îÇ -1:You got hit;Bad luck ‚Äî lose SAN
‚îÇ 1:You ate tasty candy, +SAN
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ üé≤ Outcome types ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ
‚îÇ Positive:
‚îÇ  1. Gain X EXP immediately
‚îÇ  2. Next X gains give X√ó EXP
‚îÇ  3. Whole group gains 1 EXP
‚îÇ  4. Author shares earned EXP
‚îÇ  5. Drain X EXP from X people in the channel
‚îÇ
‚îÇ Negative:
‚îÇ -1. Lose X EXP immediately
‚îÇ -2. Stop gaining EXP for X times
‚îÇ -3. Author drains X EXP from you
‚îÇ -4. Distribute X EXP to X people in the channel
‚îÇ -5. Next X messages each lose EXP
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ ‚öñÔ∏è Design limits ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ
‚îÇ ‚úÖ More positive options than negative in one event
‚îÇ üìä Up to 3+(ROUNDDOWN designerLV/10) options
‚îÇ ‚öÝÔ∏è Cannot be all-positive
‚îÇ üîã Total EN budget (10+LV); negative outcomes cost EN
‚ï∞‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ

storyteller.help:
„Äêüìñ Interactive StoryTeller„Äë
‚ï≠‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ üí° Features ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ
‚îÇ - Multi-page branches, if/else / ifs, random & ending pages
‚îÇ - Player vars, story vars, attributes; math & conditions
‚îÇ - Dice: text {2d6}; conditions/assign: 2d6>=7, 3d6+2, ‚Ä¶
‚îÇ - Import / update / verify / export RUN_DESIGN or JSON
‚îÇ - Participation: author only / everyone / Discord poll (timed)
‚îÇ - Auto-pause: idle games pause after 1 hour
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ üöÄ Quick start ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ
‚îÇ .st start <alias|title> [alone|all|poll x]
‚îÇ   Start a story. alone=author only; all=anyone; poll=Discord vote x min (default 3)
‚îÇ .st list
‚îÇ   List stories you can start here
‚îÇ .st pause / .st continue [runId]
‚îÇ   Pause or resume (use runId to resume across devices)
‚îÇ .st edit alone|all|poll x
‚îÇ   Change participation; poll is Discord-only (x minutes, default 3)
‚îÇ .st end
‚îÇ   End the current run
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ üéØ Gameplay ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ
‚îÇ .st goto <page>
‚îÇ   Jump to a page/option (UI lists available choices)
‚îÇ .st set <var> <value>
‚îÇ   Set a player variable (e.g. .st set name Hana / .st set hp 12)
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ üß∞ Story management ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ
‚îÇ .st my [alias]
‚îÇ   Stats for stories you created (optional single alias)
‚îÇ .st mylist
‚îÇ   List all stories you created
‚îÇ .st list <alias>
‚îÇ   Show intro & info for that story
‚îÇ .st import <alias> [title]
‚îÇ   Upload .json or .txt (RUN_DESIGN) to add a story (Discord only)
‚îÇ .st update <alias> [title]
‚îÇ   Overwrite an existing story via attachment (Discord only)
‚îÇ .st delete <alias>
‚îÇ   Delete a story you own
‚îÇ .st export <alias>
‚îÇ   DM a RUN_DESIGN text file and notify the channel (Discord, permission required)
‚îÇ .st verify <alias>
‚îÇ   Round-trip check: JSON ‚Üí RUN_DESIGN ‚Üí JSON
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ üîê Launch permissions ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ
‚îÇ .st allow <alias> AUTHOR
‚îÇ   Only the author can start anywhere (default)
‚îÇ .st allow <alias>
‚îÇ   Allow start in the current group/channel
‚îÇ .st allow <alias> <groupId...>
‚îÇ   Allow start in listed groups/channels
‚îÇ .st allow <alias> all
‚îÇ   Anyone can start (public)
‚îÇ .st disallow <alias> [groupId...]
‚îÇ   Revoke allow in current group/channel (or remove listed groupIds)
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ üìé Examples ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ
‚îÇ .st list              | list startable stories
‚îÇ .st start MistVillage | start that story
‚îÇ .st set name Hana     | set a player variable
‚îÇ .st goto 12           | jump to a page
‚îÇ .st pause / .st continue / .st end
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ ‚ÑπÔ∏è Notes ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ
‚îÇ - poll, import, export, update are Discord-only; default poll time is 3 minutes
‚îÇ - Authoring guide: https://bothelp.hktrpg.com/
‚ï∞‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ

admin.help:
„Äê‚öôÔ∏è Admin Toolbox„Äë
‚ï≠‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ üîç System Monitoring ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ
‚îÇ Status check:
‚îÇ „ÄÄ‚Ä¢ .admin state
‚îÇ „ÄÄ  - Check Rollbot runtime status
‚îÇ „ÄÄ  - Show system resource usage
‚îÇ
‚îÇ ID lookup:
‚îÇ „ÄÄ‚Ä¢ .admin id or .patreon id
‚îÇ „ÄÄ  - Show your user ID
‚îÇ „ÄÄ  - Show current group ID
‚îÇ „ÄÄ  - Works on all platforms
‚îÇ
‚îÇ Patreon / VIP level:
‚îÇ „ÄÄ‚Ä¢ .patreon level
‚îÇ „ÄÄ  - Check your and current group's VIP (Patreon) level
‚îÇ
‚îÇ Debug:
‚îÇ „ÄÄ‚Ä¢ .admin debug
‚îÇ „ÄÄ  - Show detailed group data
‚îÇ „ÄÄ  - Show setting status
‚îÇ
‚îÇ Database status:
‚îÇ „ÄÄ‚Ä¢ .admin mongod
‚îÇ „ÄÄ  - Check MongoDB connection status
‚îÇ
‚îÇ System protection status:
‚îÇ „ÄÄ‚Ä¢ .admin clusterhealth
‚îÇ „ÄÄ  - Check DB and cluster protection layers
‚îÇ „ÄÄ  - Show degraded mode and health stats
‚îÇ
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ üë§ Account Management ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ
‚îÇ Web character card account:
‚îÇ „ÄÄ‚Ä¢ .admin account [username] [password]
‚îÇ
‚îÇ Username rules:
‚îÇ „ÄÄ‚Ä¢ Length: 4-16 chars
‚îÇ „ÄÄ‚Ä¢ Allowed: Chinese, English
‚îÇ
‚îÇ Password rules:
‚îÇ „ÄÄ‚Ä¢ Length: 6-16 chars
‚îÇ „ÄÄ‚Ä¢ Allowed: letters
‚îÇ „ÄÄ‚Ä¢ Symbols: !@#$%^&*
‚îÇ 
‚îÇ Must be configured in direct chat with HKTRPG,
‚îÇ do not use in group channels
‚îÇ
‚îÇ Channel registration:
‚îÇ „ÄÄ‚Ä¢ .admin registerChannel
‚îÇ „ÄÄ  - Register current channel
‚îÇ „ÄÄ‚Ä¢ .admin unregisterChannel
‚îÇ „ÄÄ  - Unregister current channel
‚îÇ
‚îÇ Rolling permission:
‚îÇ „ÄÄ‚Ä¢ .admin allowrolling
‚îÇ „ÄÄ  - Allow web rolling in this channel
‚îÇ „ÄÄ‚Ä¢ .admin disallowrolling
‚îÇ „ÄÄ  - Remove web rolling permission
‚îÇ
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ üì¢ Update Notifications ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ
‚îÇ Enable:
‚îÇ „ÄÄ‚Ä¢ .admin news on
‚îÇ „ÄÄ  Receive HKTRPG updates
‚îÇ
‚îÇ Disable:
‚îÇ „ÄÄ‚Ä¢ .admin news off
‚îÇ „ÄÄ  Stop receiving updates
‚îÇ
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ üîê System Admin Only ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ
‚îÇ Service restart:
‚îÇ „ÄÄ‚Ä¢ .root respawn [ID]
‚îÇ „ÄÄ  - Restart the service by ID
‚îÇ „ÄÄ‚Ä¢ .root respawnall
‚îÇ „ÄÄ  - Restart all services
‚îÇ
‚îÇ VIP management:
‚îÇ „ÄÄ‚Ä¢ .root addVipGroup -i ID -l LV -n NAME -no NOTES -s SWITCH
‚îÇ „ÄÄ  - Add VIP group
‚îÇ „ÄÄ‚Ä¢ .root addVipUser -i ID -l LV -n NAME -no NOTES -s SWITCH
‚îÇ „ÄÄ  - Add VIP user
‚îÇ
‚îÇ Patreon members:
‚îÇ „ÄÄ‚Ä¢ .root addpatreon PATREON_NAME tier=A|B|C|D|E|F [-no NOTES] [-s on|off]
‚îÇ „ÄÄ  - Generate KEY on create; update only tier/notes/status, keep KEY
‚îÇ „ÄÄ‚Ä¢ .root regenkeypatreon PATREON_NAME
‚îÇ „ÄÄ  - Regenerate KEY, old KEY expires immediately
‚îÇ „ÄÄ‚Ä¢ .root onpatreon PATREON_NAME
‚îÇ „ÄÄ  - Enable this member
‚îÇ „ÄÄ‚Ä¢ .root offpatreon PATREON_NAME
‚îÇ „ÄÄ  - Disable this member (and revoke assigned VIP)
‚îÇ „ÄÄ‚Ä¢ .root importpatreon [allkeys|newonly] [-email]
‚îÇ „ÄÄ  - Upload .csv to sync members. allkeys=all keys, newonly=new keys only. -email=generate email content file
‚îÇ
‚îÇ Command registration:
‚îÇ „ÄÄ‚Ä¢ .root registeredGlobal
‚îÇ „ÄÄ  - Register global commands
‚îÇ „ÄÄ‚Ä¢ .root testRegistered [ID]
‚îÇ „ÄÄ  - Test command registration status
‚îÇ „ÄÄ‚Ä¢ .root removeSlashCommands [ID]
‚îÇ „ÄÄ  - Remove Slash commands from target group (uses current group if ID missing)
‚îÇ
‚îÇ Encryption:
‚îÇ „ÄÄ‚Ä¢ .root decrypt [encrypted_text]
‚îÇ „ÄÄ  - Decrypt text
‚îÇ
‚îÇ Shard fix:
‚îÇ „ÄÄ‚Ä¢ .root fixshard check
‚îÇ „ÄÄ  - Check all shard status
‚îÇ „ÄÄ‚Ä¢ .root fixshard start
‚îÇ „ÄÄ  - Start auto-fixing unresponsive shards
‚îÇ „ÄÄ‚Ä¢ .root fixshard stop
‚îÇ „ÄÄ  - Stop auto-fix
‚îÇ „ÄÄ‚Ä¢ .root fixshard status
‚îÇ „ÄÄ  - Show fix status

‚îÇ Send notifications:
‚îÇ „ÄÄ‚Ä¢ .root send News [message]
‚îÇ „ÄÄ  - Send update notification
‚ï∞‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ

views.roll_readme_html:
Features
  • Many dice commands: 1d100, 2d6, 1d20, etc.
  • Custom room names
  • Light / dark theme
  • Quick command panel
  • Download chat logs
  • Multiple rooms
  • Live online count
  • Custom nickname
How to use
  1. Enter a nickname (default: Investigator + random number; use Regenerate to change)
  2. Click Join room or enter a room name
  3. Type a roll command or chat message
  4. Click Send or press Enter
Dice format
  • Basic: XdY (X dice, Y sides)
  • Examples:
    • 1d100 ‚Äî one d100
    • 2d6 ‚Äî two d6
    • 1d20 ‚Äî one d20
Quick commands
  • Open the quick command panel from the keyboard button
  • Preset: 1d2, 1d6, 1d8, 1d10, 1d12, 1d20, 1d100
  • Up to 5 custom shortcuts
  • Tap a button to send
More
  • Quick input toggles the command panel
  • Download saves chat log (HKTRPG + room name)
  • Help opens this guide
  • Dark mode toggles theme
  • Regenerate picks a new nickname
Personal room
  • Stored locally only; not uploaded to the server
  • Bot replies appear locally only
  • Delete clears content (room stays); confirmation required
  • Cannot be undone
Notes
  • 100 messages per room max
  • Room names must be unique
  • Default room Public cannot be deleted
  • Nickname max 50 characters
  • Message max 1000 characters

More tutorials:

HKTRPG Help

views.readme_body_html:
Getting started
  1. In Discord / Telegram / Line, send to HKTRPG:
    .admin account (username) (password)
    to create a management account.
  2. Open the Character Card Manager and log in with that account.
  3. After login you can manage and edit your character cards on the web.
Adding a character card

Send this command to HKTRPG (customize name and fields):

.char add name[Character Name]~
state[HP:15/15;MP:10/10;San:80]~
roll[Brawl:cc 50;sc:cc {san}]~
notes[Notes:sample]~

After ‚Äúadded successfully‚Äù, refresh this page to see the new card. You can also edit existing cards here.

Basic steps
  1. Click ‚ÄúSelect character card‚Äù to pick a character
  2. Click the dice icon to roll
  3. Click ‚ÄúDetailed help‚Äù for full usage and formula examples
Full guide

See the official character card tutorial (includes chat commands).
views.detailed_help_body_html:
This guide covers web UI only. For Discord / chat commands see the link at the bottom.

1. Basic usage
  • Login & select card: After login, click ‚ÄúSelect character card‚Äù. Saved data syncs with Discord / chat apps.
  • Info tags under name: Small tags (e.g. DB, occupation, traits) appear under the name. Sources: (1) ‚ÄúCharacter details‚Äù label/value pairs; (2) non-numeric current-only stat fields (occupation, traits, DB+1D4, etc.). Up to 6 tags, display only ‚Äî rolls are unaffected.
  • Stats: Use ¬± to adjust current values. ‚ÄúEdit mode‚Äù lets you rename fields, edit current/max, or add/remove rows.
  • Rolling: Click the dice icon beside a roll field. Enter a dice command; you may use {variable} (see below). No angle brackets needed.
  • Notes: Plain text. Long notes show a button to open the full text in a popup.
  • Avatar: In edit mode, enter an image URL (http/https only; no LAN or localhost).
2. Advanced (web settings & syntax)
  • Roll channel (private cards): Pick a Discord channel to forward roll results. The server must be registered for rolling by an admin.
  • Public / private: Set a card to ‚ÄúPublic‚Äù to list it on public cards for others to view and roll. Set back to ‚ÄúPrivate‚Äù to hide.
  • Variable references: In roll formulas use {field name} to pull the current value from Stats (case-insensitive). The bot substitutes the value before rolling.
  • Roll syntax (web): Enter the dice command directly in each roll field.
  • Skill then damage: e.g. baton ‚Äî one field ‚ÄúBrawl‚Äù with CC 49 or CC {Brawl}, another ‚ÄúDamage‚Äù with 1d6{db} (DB value already includes +, so not 1d6+{db}). Roll skill first, then damage.
  • Roll result toasts: Results appear top-right. (1) Hover pauses auto-dismiss and pins position. (2) Click üìå to keep until refresh or unpin.
  • Formula examples (sample stats, DB = +1d4):
    HPLuckDBBrawl
    1160+1d449
    FieldSubstitutionRoll
    1d{HP}{HP} ‚Üí 11Becomes 1d11
    1d100+{hp}{hp} ‚Üí 11 (same as HP)Becomes 1d100+11
    CC {Luck}{Luck} ‚Üí 60Becomes cc 60 (CoC skill check)
    CC 49 or CC {Brawl}49 or {Brawl}‚Üí49Skill check (e.g. brawl first)
    1d6{db} (damage){db} ‚Üí +1d4Becomes 1d6+1d4

views.dlog_modal_help_html:
A companion tool for the HKTRPG Discord dice bot to analyze channel chat logs.

How to use:
Add the bot to your server with permission to read message history,
then in the target channel run
.discord html or .discord txt
The bot DMs you the export ‚Äî HTML is AES-encrypted for this viewer; TXT is plain text.
Data passes through our server; skip if you have privacy concerns.
HKTRPG Discord bot
P.S. Built as a side project for TRPG session logs ‚Äî search TRPG on YouTube for fun replays.

views.udo_changelog_html:
Changelog: 2020/02/19 ‚Äî Desktop menu can spawn characters; right-click to add a single card; duplicate with/without index; export log; random numeric suffix on names; image tag support; BGM vs SFX; unsaved-room warning on close; double-click (character, fog, terrain, vault character) for details.

2020/02/22 ‚Äî GM layer (hidden from others, keyed to player name; renaming breaks it); save player name.

2020/03/10 ‚Äî Text vault (requires reload to refresh); Ctrl+S saves room; height setting for room decor.

2020/03/12 ‚Äî Character sheet stats in chat; commands can roll dice.

2020/03/21 ‚Äî Note vault position restored; character vault shows some commands. 2020/03/28 ‚Äî SFX toggle; debug: right-click no default menu. 2020/04/17 ‚Äî CoC dice tables updated.

2020/06/05 ‚Äî Minimize window for mobile. 2020/06/09 ‚Äî Package update; click chat portrait to change icon; moon background GIF (clouds slowed).

2020/06/17 ‚Äî Official fixes through this date (version unchanged).

2020/07/08 ‚Äî v1.11.0.

2020/07/17 ‚Äî Removed image upload; use LINK for images; log export line-break fix.

2020/07/31 ‚Äî Hex grid; quick delete chat.

2020/09/06 ‚Äî SFX toggle persistence; token base resize.

2020/09/11 ‚Äî v1.11.3 and guest mode.

2020/11/18 ‚Äî v1.12.1; hex map fix.
